linkedin.text:
$1 spent on incentive travel returns $12.50 in performance. Your annual bonus pool can't say that.

Most HR leaders quote 8% retention lifts. The number for companies that invest in incentive travel is 87%.

Across 200+ events since 2010, the pattern is consistent:
→ Teams that travel together, stay together
→ Recognition trips outperform cash bonuses 3:1
→ The ROI shows up in numbers your CFO respects, not just morale

The debate isn't whether your team "deserves" a trip. It's whether you can afford the cost of losing the people who do.

📅 Comment 'GUIDE' and we'll send the ROI breakdown for your industry.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #EmployeeRetention #Leadership

facebook.text:
Pizza Fridays don't keep your best people. A trip they'll never forget does. 💡

Companies that invest in incentive travel see an 87% jump in retention — and we've watched it play out across 200+ events in 120+ countries since 2010.

The pattern never changes:
✅ Shared experiences bond teams deeper than any meeting
✅ Recognition trips beat cash bonuses 3:1
✅ Every $1 invested returns $12.50 in performance

Your best people already have offers on the table. Give them a reason to stay.

What would your team still talk about 5 years from now? Tell us in the comments. 💬
